mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.equipment_number, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_model, et.type_name AS equipment_type, e.equipment_type_id, e.equipment_status, e.stock_quantity, e.stock_quantity - COALESCE(borrow.borrow_quantity, 0) - COALESCE(unavailable.unavailable_quantity, 0) AS available_quantity, COALESCE(borrow.borrow_quantity, 0) AS borrow_quantity, COALESCE(unavailable.unavailable_quantity, 0) AS unavailable_quantity, COALESCE(reserve.reserve_quantity, 0) AS reserve_quantity, e.description, w.warehouse_name, s.supplier_name, e.equipment_image, e.qrcode_url FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON e.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON e.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT equipment_id, COALESCE(SUM(borrow_quantity), 0) AS borrow_quantity FROM equipment_borrow WHERE audit_status = 1 AND borrow_status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM equipment_return er WHERE er.borrow_id = equipment_borrow.id AND er.return_status = 1 AND er.audit_result != '报修通过自动归还') GROUP BY equipment_id ) borrow ON e.id = borrow.equipment_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT equipment_id, COALESCE(SUM(repair_quantity), 0) AS unavailable_quantity FROM equipment_repair WHERE repair_status = 1 AND audit_status = 1 GROUP BY equipment_id ) unavailable ON e.id = unavailable.equipment_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT equipment_id, COUNT(*) AS reserve_quantity FROM equipment_reservation WHERE reserve_status = 1 AND audit_status = 1 AND DATE_ADD(reserve_time, INTERVAL reserve_duration HOUR) > NOW() GROUP BY equipment_id ) reserve ON e.id = reserve.equipment_id
( e.equipment_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND et.type_name = #{equipmentType}
ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.id, e.equipment_number, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_model, et.type_name AS equipment_type, e.equipment_type_id, e.equipment_status, e.stock_quantity, e.stock_quantity - COALESCE(borrow.borrow_quantity, 0) - COALESCE(unavailable.unavailable_quantity, 0) AS available_quantity, COALESCE(borrow.borrow_quantity, 0) AS borrow_quantity, COALESCE(unavailable.unavailable_quantity, 0) AS unavailable_quantity, COALESCE(reserve.reserve_quantity, 0) AS reserve_quantity, e.description, w.warehouse_name, s.supplier_name, e.equipment_image, e.qrcode_url FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON e.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON e.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT equipment_id, COALESCE(SUM(borrow_quantity), 0) AS borrow_quantity FROM equipment_borrow WHERE audit_status = 1 AND borrow_status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM equipment_return er WHERE er.borrow_id = equipment_borrow.id AND er.return_status = 1 AND er.audit_result != '报修通过自动归还') GROUP BY equipment_id ) borrow ON e.id = borrow.equipment_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT equipment_id, COALESCE(SUM(repair_quantity), 0) AS unavailable_quantity FROM equipment_repair WHERE repair_status = 1 AND audit_status = 1 GROUP BY equipment_id ) unavailable ON e.id = unavailable.equipment_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT equipment_id, COUNT(*) AS reserve_quantity FROM equipment_reservation WHERE reserve_status = 1 AND audit_status = 1 AND DATE_ADD(reserve_time, INTERVAL reserve_duration HOUR) > NOW() GROUP BY equipment_id ) reserve ON e.id = reserve.equipment_id WHERE e.id = #{id}
SELECT DISTINCT et.type_name FROM equipment_type et INNER JOIN equipment e ON et.id = e.equipment_type_id ORDER BY et.type_name
